verses.text: Topa aw, awngin nang kong sam hi. Ka belh suangpi aw, keima thu-ah hong bilngong kei in. Tua bangin kei tungah hong dai dide lecin, Leihawm sunga a paisukte tawh a kibang ka suak ding hi
Siangtho pen mun lamah ka khutte hong laamto a, nangma kiangah huhna kong nget mah bangin kong thumna aw hong za in
Amau' lungsim sungah siatna a om hinapi a vengte tawh kilemna thu a gen khem, siatna bawlte, migilote tawh kei hong lakhiakhawm kei in
Amau' sepna leh a gamtat siatnate uh bangin amaute thukkik in. Amau' sepna tawh a kizui-in amaute tungah thuk in la, amau' ngah ding a kilawm thaman pia in
Amaute in Topa' nasepnate thupi ngaihsutlo ahih manun, amah in amaute susia-in a donkik nawnkei ding hi
Ka thumna aw hong za ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
Topa, ka hatna leh ka lum hi a, amah ka muang hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong kihuh a, lungdamin ka diang a, ka lasakna tawh ama tungah lungdamna ka ko hi
Topa, ama mite' hatna hi a, amah pen a sathau nilhpa' bukna leh a honkhiapa ahi hi
Na mite hon in la, na luahte thupha pia in. Amau a cingpa hi in la, a tawntungin amaute huh in.
